title: antiaris toxicaria var. welwitschii
intro: Antiaris toxicaria var. welwitschii, also known as the 'Kombo' tree, is a species of plant native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Moraceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its toxic and medicinal properties, with the bark being particularly valued for its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Antiaris toxicaria var. welwitschii include its ability to treat various ailments such as malaria, fever, and gastrointestinal issues, making it a valuable natural remedy. In traditional herbal medicine, preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, demonstrating its versatility and potential in alternative medicine.
